top_signals.title: Belarus-linked hackers use fake training certificates to target Ukrainian officials
top_signals.summary: A Belarus-linked hacking group known as GhostWriter has launched a new espionage campaign against Ukrainian government officials using fake emails disguised as messages from a popular online learning platform to deliver malware.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
